name: IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B
description: IRC_STEP_ACTION_USAGES_B table stores all configured actions for the given step of lifecycle.

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: STEP ACTION USAGE ID : Primary key for the table

columns.Name: TRACE_LOG
columns.Comments: Lifecycle API internal data for troubleshooting purposes.

columns.Name: LAST_EXECUTION_RESULT
columns.Comments: LAST_EXECUTION_RESULT : stores the result of last execution action

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: ACTION_CODE : Action code corresponding to the action configured for given step

columns.Name: TRIGGER_EVENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Event that will trigger action execution

columns.Name: ROUTING_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: Step ID : Step ID  corresponding to the  given step  configured

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: ACTION_ID: Action ID  corresponding to the action configured for given step

columns.Name: SETTING_ID
columns.Comments: FK to IRC_LC_SETTINGS table. Setting object holding action configuration.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: LAST_EXECUTION_DATE
columns.Comments: LAST_EXECUTION_DATE : Timestamp of last triggered action for the given step
